source: GSE Conto Termico 3.0 — Catalogo degli apparecchi prequalificati (III.A pompe di calore, III.B sistemi ibridi, III.E scaldacqua PdC)
operator: GSE — Gestore dei Servizi Energetici S.p.A. (Italian state-owned energy services operator)
role: LISTING OVERLAY ONLY for the IT market (docs/CANONICAL_TECHNICAL_BASELINE_AND_LOCAL_MARKET_OVERLAY.md). Only catalogue III.A can confirm a listing; III.B lists hybrid COMBOS (never evidence for a standalone HP — the ODU-overlap rule) and III.E (DHW) has no canonical counterpart; both are kept as snapshot facts. The catalogue publishes NO refrigerant or sound data, so a catalogue row can never become a public product (Data-Sheet eligibility is unreachable — a model name is not a data sheet).
acquisition: scripts/it/fetch-gse.mjs — three public PDF catalogues at stable URLs (Acrobat prints of GSE's internal Excel files; replaced in place on update, ETag/Last-Modified recorded); 1.5s politeness between files; parsed with pdftotext -layout (poppler) by scripts/it/parse-gse.mjs.
terms_status: The catalogue pages and PDFs declare no reuse licence; GSE is an Italian public body (PSI/open-data defaults, d.lgs. 36/2006). Facts-only use with source attribution and snapshot dates; never render GSE logos or presentation material. The catalogue publishes no per-row identifier — our gse_entry_key is an internal deterministic key and is never displayed as an official id.
programs: Conto Termico 3.0 (DM 07.08.2025, operational from 25.12.2025; catalogues published 15.04.2026): appliances in the pre-qualified catalogue get the simplified application path with reduced documentation. Catalogue listing is NOT a strict prerequisite and never implies incentive entitlement (applicant/building/intervention rules apply) — the app claims no eligibility.
snapshot_layout: raw/YYYY-MM/{IIIA.pdf, IIIB.pdf, IIIE.pdf, _meta.json} -> parsed/YYYY-MM/gse-normalized.json -> matching/YYYY-MM/{canonical-gse-overlay.json, canonical-gse-review.json} (all gitignored); committed state: gse-match-history.json
